verses.text: Israel is 'an empty vine' bringing forth fruit only to himself, multiplying altars as he prospered; 'their heart is divided.' Selfish abundance. Prosperity spent on idols proves a divided heart.
Israel is 'an empty vine' bringing forth fruit only to himself, multiplying altars as he prospered; 'their heart is divided.' Selfish abundance. Prosperity spent on idols proves a divided heart.
Soon they will say, 'We have no king,' for they feared not the LORD; their false oaths spring up 'as hemlock.' Bitter fruit. Broken faith poisons a whole society.
Soon they will say, 'We have no king,' for they feared not the LORD; their false oaths spring up 'as hemlock.' Bitter fruit. Broken faith poisons a whole society.
The calf of Beth-aven shall be carried to Assyria, the high places destroyed; they shall cry to the hills, 'Cover us.' Idols exiled. The gods men trusted are dragged away in shame.
The calf of Beth-aven shall be carried to Assyria, the high places destroyed; they shall cry to the hills, 'Cover us.' Idols exiled. The gods men trusted are dragged away in shame.
The calf of Beth-aven shall be carried to Assyria, the high places destroyed; they shall cry to the hills, 'Cover us.' Idols exiled. The gods men trusted are dragged away in shame.
The calf of Beth-aven shall be carried to Assyria, the high places destroyed; they shall cry to the hills, 'Cover us.' Idols exiled. The gods men trusted are dragged away in shame.
Israel has sinned 'from the days of Gibeah'; God will chastise them when He pleases. Long rebellion. A lengthy record of sin meets at last its reckoning.
Israel has sinned 'from the days of Gibeah'; God will chastise them when He pleases. Long rebellion. A lengthy record of sin meets at last its reckoning.
'Sow to yourselves in righteousness, reap in mercy; break up your fallow ground: for it is time to seek the LORD.' A gospel call. Repentance is fresh ploughing of a hardened heart.
'Sow to yourselves in righteousness, reap in mercy; break up your fallow ground: for it is time to seek the LORD.' A gospel call. Repentance is fresh ploughing of a hardened heart.
They plowed wickedness and reaped iniquity, trusting their own way; so 'thy king' shall be cut off. Reaping sin. What is sown in self-trust is harvested in ruin.
